name: Maine Tangy Lobster
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except lobster, in the top part of a double boiler.
2. Melt over hot water and stir to blend well.
3. Cut the lobster into small pieces.
4. Add the lobster pieces to the mixture and cook for 6 minutes.
5. Serve on toast with lemon wedges.
Serves 4.
